shellCommands.command:
cat /home/user/workspace/package.json && printf '
---
' && cat /home/user/workspace/next.config.ts && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/_app.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/_document.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/_error.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/404.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/index.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/blog/index.js && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/workspace/pages/blog/[id].js && printf '
---
' && find /home/user/workspace/pages/api -type f -maxdepth 3 -print -exec sed -n '1,220p' {} \;

find /home/user/workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -path '*/styles/*' -o -path '*/components/*' -o -name 'tsconfig.json' -o -name '*.css' \) | sed 's#^/home/user/workspace/##' | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo --- {}; sed -n "1,220p" "/home/user/workspace/{}"'

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx')
s=p.read_text()
s=s.replace("import { headers } from 'next/headers';\n", "")
s=s.replace("  const userAgent = headers().get('user-agent') ?? '';\n", "  const headerStore = await import('next/headers').then((m) => m.headers());\n  const userAgent = headerStore.get('user-agent') ?? '';\n")
p.write_text(s)
PY
cd /home/user/workspace && npm run build
